## ExtensionTypeKind type

Top-level type kinds that extension applicability hooks may inspect.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type ExtensionTypeKind = "primitive" | "enum" | "array" | "object" | "record" | "union" | "reference" | "dynamic" | "custom";
```
